description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean white walls and large, arched windows distributed evenly across all visible facades. The structure includes a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool and a covered outdoor dining area, visible through a transparent canopy. The interior layout is open and airy, with multiple rooms, a central hallway, and visible modern furnishings such as a curved reception desk and minimalist decor. The roof is predominantly flat, with some sections featuring glass or translucent coverings to allow natural light into the living spaces. The main entrance is marked by a dark, modern door and is complemented by a series of steps and a sleek, understated entryway. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open space, light, and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, white house with large arched windows, a flat roof, and a backyard featuring a pool and covered patio. The design is open, airy, and contemporary with minimalist details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a dark door, large arched windows, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, multiple arched windows, and the covered outdoor dining area adjacent to the pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, transparent canopy, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the curved reception area inside, more arched windows, and the transition between indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a modern dark door, minimal steps, and a clean, understated facade with no porch or overhang.
